name: PRISMA 2020 Systematic Review Flow
input: Generate a PRISMA 2020 flow diagram for a systematic review on 'Efficacy of SGLT2 inhibitors in heart failure with preserved ejection fraction'. Records identified: 2,847 from PubMed, 1,923 from Embase, 456 from Cochrane. After removing 1,156 duplicates, 4,070 records were screened. 3,891 excluded by title/abstract. 179 full-text articles assessed. 142 excluded (67 wrong outcome, 38 wrong population, 22 wrong intervention, 15 conference abstracts only). 37 studies included in qualitative synthesis, 28 in meta-analysis.
qualityCriteria: Four clear phases: Identification, Screening, Eligibility, Included
All numeric values present and correct
Exclusion reasons shown as side branches with counts
Color coding distinguishes phases (blue, yellow, orange, green)
Long text like 'SGLT2 inhibitors' not truncated
napkinBenchmark: Professional PRISMA flow with color-coded phases, clear numeric annotations at each step, side branches for exclusions with bullet-pointed reasons, all text readable without truncation.
